# Vault Log

> **Append-only chronological record of every vault operation.** Never edit past entries. Add new ones at the top (reverse chronological).
>
> Entry format: `## [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM] <operation> | <subject>` followed by bullet points of what changed.

---

## [0000-00-00 00:00] vault created
- Fresh vault initialized from docs/templates/vault-starter/
- No sources ingested yet
- Next: drop brand guides, research, and past campaign materials into `raw/` to begin ingestion
